channel.title: LLM Timeline — Bloomberg Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Bloomberg.

item.title: BloombergGPT (Bloomberg)
item.description: Parameters: BloombergGPT License: closed Type: model Video: https://youtu.be/m2Scj2SO85Y Underperforms GPT-3, based on BLOOM. Tokens: 'We select a model size motivated by Hoffmann et al. (2022) and train a 50 billion parameter model on 569 billion tokens from our corpus of over 700 billion tokens to produce a model that is competitive with larger models.'
